home.heroSubtitle: Explore bilingual mock sign-in flows — email, social, SMS, and passwordless. No backend, UI showcase only.
home.flowsSubtitle: Each method has its own dedicated screens — no cluttered all-in-one forms.
home.feature1Desc: Separate screens per auth method for a clean, focused UX.
home.feature2Desc: English and Persian with full right-to-left support.
home.feature3Desc: Orange-accent theme with system-aware dark and light modes.

authHub.title: Choose Sign-In Method
authHub.subtitle: Pick a flow to explore. All interactions are simulated on the client.

social.title: Social Sign-In
social.desc: OAuth-style screens for Google, GitHub, Apple, and Microsoft.
social.pageSubtitle: Select a provider to view its mock OAuth screen.

email.title: Email & Password
email.desc: Classic login and registration with form validation.
email.pageSubtitle: Choose login or create a new account.

phone.title: Phone / SMS OTP
phone.desc: Two-step phone verification with one-time code.
phone.pageSubtitle: Enter your mobile number to receive a mock OTP code.

magicLink.title: Magic Link
magicLink.pageSubtitle: Receive a mock magic link — no password required.

hubDesc.google: Sign in with your Google account

socialOAuth.consentIntro: {{provider}} wants to access your account on {{app}}
socialOAuth.permissionsTitle: This app will be able to
socialOAuth.mockNote: Mock OAuth screen — no real data is shared

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.title: User Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Mock session overview
dashboard.portfolioPitch: Like this UI? View more projects or request a consultation.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.subtitle: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

phoneOtp.enterSubtitle: We'll send a one-time verification code via SMS (mock).
phoneOtp.demoHint: Mock SMS — no real message is sent

validation.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid phone number (10+ digits)

errors.otpExpired: Code expired — request a new one
errors.sessionExpired: Session expired — enter your phone again
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

magicLink.demoHint: Mock email — no real message is sent

magicLink.sentHint: Open the email and click the link — or use the button below to simulate it in this demo.

errors.linkExpired: Link expired — request a new one
errors.sessionExpired: Session expired — enter your email again
